GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_09 Coverage Gap In-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1 Month Supply on Tier 9 NUM 8 X - - - - -
1 For all columns under "Year of Data File": X = variable is present (shading or '-' indicates it is not); LC = length change for variable.
2 Length reflects the length of the most recent data file. Refer to Footnote 1 regarding 'LC' (length change) to identify if/when there was a change in length.
3 Prior to the 2013 data release, CCW was required to encrypt these
